hero.title: An AI copilot that reads, writes, and remembers across the web
hero.subtitle: Not just a chatbot — a personal work partner that treats every web page as a workspace. Page content, multiple tabs, input forms, even site UI: automate it all in one natural-language line, and per-site work memory restores itself on your next visit.
hero.trust: Works with OpenAI · Gemini · Claude · LM Studio

p1.title: Extensions you can't trust or customize
p1.desc: You installed an extension for a simple feature, but it feels sketchy or doesn't work the way you want.

p2.title: You need a feature only on this site
p2.desc: Just one shortcut or button would help, but there's no way to add it without coding.

p3.title: Dozens of tabs, hundreds of bookmarks
p3.desc: You've lost track of which tab is where, and cleaning up old bookmarks feels impossible.

p4.title: AI answers, you still execute
p4.desc: AI gives the answer — then you copy, paste, and click through it yourself.

context.title: Page-context AI
context.desc: Understands the current page, selected text, input fields, screenshots and page structure together.
context.example: Article summary, auto-fill after field analysis

action.title: Browser action automation
action.desc: Turns natural-language requests into real browser actions — tab cleanup, bookmark sorting, form filling and more.
action.example: Auto-group dozens of tabs, organize old bookmarks

script.title: Build your own extensions
script.desc: Create per-site shortcuts, floating tools, and UI tweaks by chatting with AI — no coding required.

memory.title: Per-site work memory
memory.desc: Per-site isolated memory persists your work progress and comparison results. On your next visit, it restores automatically — no need to start from scratch.
memory.example: Auto-restore shopping comparison tables and research notes

multiTab.title: Multi-tab Synthesis
multiTab.desc: Read multiple tabs at once and consolidate into a markdown comparison table

webSearch.title: Web Search Integration
webSearch.desc: AI calls supplementary web search automatically

image.title: Image & Screenshot
image.example: Vision analysis of charts and infographics

autofill.title: Doc & Form Auto-fill
autofill.desc: Assist with groupware docs and request forms (Lexical / Slate / Draft / ProseMirror compatible)

tone.title: Tone Conversion
tone.desc: Shorter, more polite, more formal — convert the whole tone in one line

improve.title: Text Improvement
improve.desc: Polish text directly in input fields

select.title: Text Selection
select.desc: Right-click and Floating Helper — both routes process the selected text instantly

action.title: Action Tools
action.desc: GOTO · CLICK · FILL · EXTRACT — single-shot browser action primitives

scriptCRUD.title: Automation Asset Management
scriptCRUD.desc: /act_list to browse registered scripts, /act_edit to update or delete

workMemory.title: Work Memory
workMemory.desc: Per-site isolated memory persists work context + auto-restores on revisit

floating.title: Floating Helper
floating.desc: Quick action menu next to your selection — translate, search, multilingual conversion, summarize in one click

s1.title: Absorb the room → write a natural-fit comment
s1.desc: Auto-summarize the post and read the comment mood, then the AI fills your reply box with an empathetic comment. You stay in control of the submit.

s2.title: Absorb foreign-language sources like your native one
s2.desc: Floating Helper inline translation, instant term lookup, full-page Korean summary, vision analysis on charts, and a markdown study note — one flow.

s3.title: Tab orchestration + per-tab comparison & analysis
s3.desc: Group many tabs at once, then synthesize per-tab data into a comparison table or roll up per-tab content into a single report. One natural-language line completes a full multi-tab workflow.
s3.targetSites: Shopping · news · research — any multi-tab workflow
s3.exampleCompare: 📊 "Build a comparison table of laptop price / shipping / rating across each tab"
s3.exampleNews: 📰 "Roll up the news from each tab into one report"

s4.title: Customize site UI/UX yourself
s4.desc: One natural-language line lets you add or change the look, behavior, and features of any site. Zero code.
s4.exampleAdblock: 🚫 Ad block — "hide the ads in this area"
s4.exampleMail: 📧 Translate-and-email floating button — see the prompt below
s4.promptBody: The selected area is the article body. Add a floating button on this site that translates the article body into Korean and emails it to cookyman@gmail.com.

s5.title: AI writing partner — research to multilingual conversion
s5.desc: Source research, full-text auto-fill, tone conversion, partial proofing, and FH multilingual conversion — all in one flow.
s5.targetSites: Notion · Google Docs · Medium · Tistory · WordPress

s6.title: Research workflow — synthesize many sources, persist your study notes
s6.desc: Group tabs by topic, synthesize them in one shot, and persist your study progress per site via Work Memory.
s6.targetSites: Academic papers · Wikipedia · multiple news sources

d1.desc: Goes beyond answering — it operates the browser directly.

d2.desc: Turn a one-time task into a permanent script.

d3.desc: Works with page structure, input fields, tabs and scripts together.

d4.desc: Read multiple tabs at once and consolidate them into a markdown comparison table.

d5.desc: Per-site work memory restores itself on your next visit.

aiModes.title: Supported AI Modes
aiModes.subtitle: Choose between cloud services and local SLMs depending on the situation.

approval.title: Approval-based risk control
approval.desc: Risky actions require explicit user approval.

register.title: Explicit permanent script registration
register.desc: Permanent scripts go through an explicit registration flow.

session.title: Trackable session scripts
session.desc: Session scripts can be reviewed and rolled back.

sensitive.title: Conservative handling of sensitive sites
sensitive.desc: Government, finance, and submission steps use assisted input with user confirmation.

loop.title: Agentic loop hard-stop
loop.desc: Repeated calls of the same tool are hard-stopped. Legitimate cases like multi-tab read are allowed via args-aware gating.

roadmap.title: What's Next
roadmap.subtitle: Where we're extending each of today's strengths.

floatingExpansion.title: Floating Helper context expansion
floatingExpansion.desc: Extend from text-selection-only to images, links, tables, and code blocks as selection contexts.

scriptPromotion.title: Session script → permanent asset promotion
scriptPromotion.desc: An integrated flow to review session EXECUTE_SCRIPT history and promote it to REGISTER_SCRIPT in one step.

studio.title: Extension App Studio
studio.desc: A library-style environment to browse, edit, and version-manage per-site scripts.

business.title: Apply this extension's technology to your own services
business.subtitle: Page-context understanding, Action Tools agent, and script execution infra are not locked to a single product. Partnership, technology internalization, and co-development are all on the table.

context.title: Page-context AI
context.desc: An AI pipeline that never loses user context

actionTools.title: Action Tools Agent
actionTools.desc: Safe-boundary automation that operates the browser directly

finalCta.title: Get started on Chrome now
finalCta.subtitle: Use page-context AI immediately after installation.
